seg.t: Event classification: NYSE. Subject-anchored, verbal compliance vector. The duty element did the containment; the resolving was done before they reached the lounge, by the witness, with the nearest heavy thing she could lift.

Witness behaviour, per debrief and her own account: she worked out the operating condition from cover, kept her eyes to herself for the better part of half an hour, and committed to a swing she could not call back before the subject could tell her to stop. The subject did tell her to stop. The swing was already past arguing with.

She did not resist the order. I am not persuaded that resisting it was available, to her or to anyone. She beat its timing, and timing can be trained. She survived a direct command on a technicality; I would not plan on that luck twice. Recommend contact inside thirty days. Field-eligible, pending evaluation.
